description_short: Harborlight Health makes care coordination software for community health centers, closing referral loops and tracking quality measures for UDS reporting.
description_long:
Harborlight Health gives care teams at community health centers a shared worklist across visits, referrals, and follow-ups. The platform closes referral loops with two-way faxing and e-referrals, integrates with the EHRs clinics already use, and drafts daily outreach lists.

It targets federally qualified health centers, tracking the quality measures they must report for UDS. The company cites HIPAA-compliant infrastructure with SOC 2 Type II certification and is based at 77 Summer Street, Boston, MA.
